channel.title: mimiwheeli TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from mimiwheeli

item.title: come with me to drift for the first time at @Sprint Fest SG! 🏎️💨 special thanks to glenn for making this happen and to johnny and clifford for the ride :) 👕 top from @REVENANT, use code ‘MIMI’ for 10% off! #sgcars #sprintfest #drifting #jdm #cartok
item.description: come with me to drift for the first time at @Sprint Fest SG! 🏎️💨 special thanks to glenn for making this happen and to johnny and clifford for the ride :) 👕 top from @REVENANT, use code ‘MIMI’ for 10% off! #sgcars #sprintfest #drifting #jdm #cartok

item.title: Group rides, good vibes, Christmas edition 🎄 Thank you for everyone who joined! Congratulations to all of our game winners 🏆 See y’all at the next one 👀 Hosted by me & @ＧＹＭ • ＲＩＤＥ • ＹＡＰ | Prizes sponsored by HKS & Venue sponsored by Rounding #sgbikers #b

item.title: What a way to celebrate CNY 🧧🏍️ Huge thank you to everyone who came down and rode with us @NxR, making this ride-out such an unforgettable one. Seeing so many bikes, familiar faces, and new friends come together is exactly what this community is about. Th
item.description: What a way to celebrate CNY 🧧🏍️ Huge thank you to everyone who came down and rode with us @NxR, making this ride-out such an unforgettable one. Seeing so many bikes, familiar faces, and new friends come together is exactly what this community is about. Th
item.author: mimiwheeli

item.title: Camera brain is real, and it completely ruined the ride for me. So, I hit pause. ⏸️ We’re doing things differently from now on, starting my new series, the NxR community (@NxR) and surviving my Class 2A journey. Who else has experienced burnout from tryin
item.description: Camera brain is real, and it completely ruined the ride for me. So, I hit pause. ⏸️ We’re doing things differently from now on, starting my new series, the NxR community (@NxR) and surviving my Class 2A journey. Who else has experienced burnout from tryin
item.author: mimiwheeli

item.title: Is getting a motorcycle licence actually worth the sunburn and the circuit revisions? Honestly… yes. 🚦 We all know bikes are (mostly) cheaper to run and park, but after getting my P-plate, I realised the biggest pros had nothing to do with cost. It comple
item.description: Is getting a motorcycle licence actually worth the sunburn and the circuit revisions? Honestly… yes. 🚦 We all know bikes are (mostly) cheaper to run and park, but after getting my P-plate, I realised the biggest pros had nothing to do with cost. It comple
item.author: mimiwheeli

item.title: Let’s have a quick reality check before you pay for your bike school enrolment 🛑 Everyone talks about the freedom, the cheap parking, and the "cool factor" of getting a motorcycle. But nobody warns you about the absolute chaos it does to your aesthetic, y
item.description: Let’s have a quick reality check before you pay for your bike school enrolment 🛑 Everyone talks about the freedom, the cheap parking, and the "cool factor" of getting a motorcycle. But nobody warns you about the absolute chaos it does to your aesthetic, y
item.author: mimiwheeli

item.title: First open meet, and honestly I’m really grateful for how it turned out ✨ Big thanks to everyone who came through. Hope you had a good time, met some new people, and enjoyed just hanging out together. The whole idea of this is to bring people together who
item.description: First open meet, and honestly I’m really grateful for how it turned out ✨ Big thanks to everyone who came through. Hope you had a good time, met some new people, and enjoyed just hanging out together. The whole idea of this is to bring people together who
item.author: mimiwheeli
